name: pokemon-tcg
description: Multilingual Pokémon TCG catalog — search any card in EN/JA/KO/ZH and see every regional print side-by-side.

scripts.build: tsx scripts/fetch-and-build-data.ts && astro build && pagefind --site dist
scripts.build:fixtures: FIXTURES=1 tsx scripts/fetch-and-build-data.ts && astro build && pagefind --site dist
